description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a matte black bezel. The bezel is moderately thick and features a subtle, slightly curved top edge, giving the monitor a modern yet understated appearance. The screen sits atop a geometric, polygonal pedestal stand that provides stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The rear of the monitor is solid black with no visible ports or ventilation, maintaining a clean and minimalistic look. A small, centered brand logo is present on the lower bezel, adding a touch of branding without being obtrusive. No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear, contributing to the streamlined design.
description: A flat-panel computer monitor with a matte black bezel, polygonal pedestal stand, and a centered brand logo on the lower bezel. The design is modern, minimalistic, and free of visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat display, matte black bezel, and centered brand logo on the lower bezel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the angular, polygonal pedestal stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back panel with no visible ports, buttons, or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim profile and geometric stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with a slightly curved top edge and straight sides, providing a modern and minimalistic frame around the display.
attribute_stand_type: Polygonal pedestal stand with a wide, angular base, made of matte black plastic or coated metal, offering stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitor.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white brand logo is present at the center of the lower bezel, directly below the screen.
